final_prompt.prompt:
Design a logo using the provided letter "B" — a serif elegant style — with an eye symbol integrated in the center of the letter, similar to the reference logo shown.

Style/medium: elegant serif logo design, flat vector
Composition: the letter "B" centered, eye motif placed inside/within the counter or middle of the "B"
Subject: logo combining the letter "B" (serif, elegant) with an eye in the middle, referencing the provided "B" letterform and the reference logo layout
Scene/backdrop: transparent or clean white background
Lighting/mood:
Color palette:
Materials/textures:
Text (verbatim): B
Constraints:
  use the provided letter "B" as the base letterform
  eye must be integrated inside the letter, as in the reference logo
Avoid: raster effects, drop shadows, photographic elements
